changelog:
### 🚀 Persistent Selection Memory in Ledger
- **Automatic Account & Pot Memory** — Record Transaction form now automatically remembers and pre-selects your last selected Asset Account and Target/Deduct Pot.
- **Fast Multi-Transaction Logging** — Prevents redundant account and pot picking when logging multiple transactions consecutively in the ledger.
- **Transfer Form Pre-Selection** — Asset Transfer form automatically defaults source account and pot to your last chosen selections.
